$comment: no-tiny-text override for design-system showcase: 10px Micro Label is a documented, sanctioned step of the type scale (see TypeScale.tsx), not an accessibility bug. Suppression approved by Bora 2026-07-12. Scoped to this directory only via ignore.overrides so genuinely-too-small text elsewhere still gets flagged. TaskBoard is the visual-locked flagship board; split deferred by Bora 2026-07-16 (regression risk on animation wiring outweighs readability gain). div+role="button" a11y pattern follows the WTC in-repo precedent; real <button> conversion rejected 2026-07-16 (visual-locked DS, nested-interactive semantics); keyboard parity implemented via onKeyDown.
